message:
fix: assorted bug fixes and code quality improvements

Collection of minor fixes and improvements across multiple modules.

Bundle backup organization (src/cli/commands/bundle.rs):
- Organize backup files per-skill rather than flat structure
- skill_backup_root = backup_root.join(&skill_name)
- Prevents file conflicts when multiple skills have same-named files
- Improves backup discoverability and cleanup

Slicing header cost fix (src/core/slicing.rs):
- Only count header cost for first slice in a section
- Prevents double-counting when section has multiple blocks
- More accurate token budget estimation

Evidence truncation refactor (src/cli/commands/evidence.rs):
- Use shared truncate_string utility instead of inline logic
- Consistent truncation behavior across codebase

Code style and lint fixes:
- src/bundler/manifest.rs: Add underscores to hex literal (0x1234_5678_u32)
- src/cass/brenner.rs: Combine match patterns per clippy suggestion
- src/cass/mining.rs: Additional pattern comparison refinements

These changes improve code maintainability and fix edge cases
discovered during testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
